name: Lü Meng (Ziming)
page_title: Lü Meng (Ziming) 呂蒙 (子明) [Wu] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
ranks: General of the Interior Who Crosses the Fields
novel_notes:
Differences Between Fact and Common Fiction
	
		
	Did not historically die after being possessed by Guan Yu’s spirit. His SGZ biography states that he was sickly and died from illness at the age of 42.

sections.details:
Traditional Chinese 
	呂蒙 (子明)


	 Simplified Chinese 
	吕蒙 (子明)


	 Pronunciation 
	Lv3 Meng1 (Zi3ming2) 


	 Pinyin (Tones) 
	Lǚ Mēng (Zǐmíng)


	 Wade-Giles 
	Lü Mêng (Tzŭ-ming)

	 Birthplace 
	Fupo in Runan

	 Name Notes 
	The Lü surname is pronounced Lü2 because of the preceeding Meng, which is 3rd tone, the same rule applies when pronouncing the style name because Zi3 is also third tone.

full_text:
Lü Meng (Ziming) 呂蒙 (子明)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lü Meng (呂蒙), styledZiming (子明), was born in Fupo in Runan. Served Wu. Originally a skilled warrior, turned out to be a scholar as well. Lü Meng was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Lü Meng lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
Return to theThree Kingdoms Encyclopediaor browse theEncyclopedia Directory.
